reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación de servicio. Los baños están siempre limpios. El shop no es muy variado pero sirve. En la playa jamás tuve un inconveniente, los chicos atienden bien y no perdí tiempo en ninguna ocasión.

(Translated by Google)
Very good gas station. The restrooms are always clean. The convenience store isn't very well-stocked, but it's adequate. I've never had a problem at the pump; the staff are very helpful, and I've never wasted any time.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURfbExTX01nEAE

reviews.comment:
Una atención de lujo

(Translated by Google)
Luxury service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURaajRQbzN3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Buena estación de servicio, con personal atento y amable. El lugar está siempre limpio. Sin embargo, lo que puede resultar un inconveniente es la eterna fila, especialmente durante la temporada alta o en horas pico, lo que puede hacer que la espera sea muy larga. A pesar de este detalle, sigue siendo una opción confiable y recomendable para quienes necesiten cargar combustible.

(Translated by Google)
A good gas station with attentive and friendly staff. The place is always clean. However, the long lines, especially during peak season or rush hour, can be a drawback, making for a very long wait. Despite this, it remains a reliable and recommended option for those needing to fill up.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfX2FXTFpnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy lenta la atención. Los chicos son muy amables Pero hay mucha gente cargando combustible y solo dos playeros

(Translated by Google)
The service is very slow. The guys are very friendly, but there are a lot of people getting fuel and only two attendants.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfMWR6THB3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Una belleza el lugar, todo ambientado de acuerdo al entorno. Excelente servicio por parte de los playeros.
No le doy 5 estrellas ya que prácticamente es nulo el estacionamiento

(Translated by Google)
The place is beautiful, everything is decorated to match the surroundings. Excellent service from the beach attendants.
I'm not giving it 5 stars because parking is practically nonexistent.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfeXJfRDNRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Horrible, 2 horas esperando a pleno sol, hay una sola persona atendiendo en plena temporada alta, si pueden vayan a otra ciudad o carguen antes de la aduana perderán 2 horas fijo.

(Translated by Google)
Horrible, 2 hours waiting in the full sun, there's only one person working in the middle of peak season, if you can go to another city or load up before customs, you'll definitely lose 2 hours.

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Estamos 2hs formando fila para cargar nafta y viene la gente  con bidones, sin formar la fila y les llenan los bidones encima no son homologados. Totalmente injusto para la gente que nos comemos terrible fila porque no nos queda otra y tenemos que seguir de viaje.

(Translated by Google)
We've been waiting in line for two hours to get gas, and people are coming in with jerrycans, skipping the line, and getting their jerrycans filled up—and they're not even certified! It's completely unfair to those of us who have to endure this terrible line because we have no other choice and need to continue our journey.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1084216927848101404/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNfZ0pmLWN3EAE

reviews.comment:
Solo les funciona una bomba en plena temporada. 2 horas de espera para cargar

(Translated by Google)
Only one pump works during peak season. Two-hour wait for refueling.
